channel.title: Science - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: NASA shares breathtaking images of Artemis II astronauts taking in the view from Orion's windows - Engadget
item.description:
1. NASA shares breathtaking images of Artemis II astronauts taking in the view from Orion's windows  Engadget
  2. Artemis II Flight Day 5: Crew Demos Suits, Readies for Lunar Flyby  NASA (.gov)
  3. NASA Artemis II Astronauts Race Into Moon’s Embrace After Quiet Easter  The New York Times
  4. Artemis II shares new images as it gets closer to the moon  CNN
  5. Artemis II is about to break a record that should never have been  The Globe and Mail

item.description:

  4. Artemis II crew hears from NASA Apollo astronaut on Easter  Florida Today
  5. SC native, an Apollo 16 astronaut, records message for Artemis II crew  FOX Carolina

item.title: Artemis II toilet acts up again as astronauts speed toward the moon to break Apollo 13's record - Phys.org
item.description:
1. Artemis II toilet acts up again as astronauts speed toward the moon to break Apollo 13's record  Phys.org

  3. Artemis II Flight Update: Crew and Ground Teams Successfully Troubleshoot Orion’s Toilet  NASA (.gov)
  4. Moon-bound Artemis II crew reflects on wonder of deep space experience: "You are special in all of this emptiness"  cbsnews.com

  4. AI Systems Lack Internal Awareness of Physical Constraints  Labroots

item.title: Scientists Uncover Three Oceans' Worth of Water Stored 700 Kilometers Below Earth's Surface - Indian Defence Review
item.description:
1. Scientists Uncover Three Oceans' Worth of Water Stored 700 Kilometers Below Earth's Surface  Indian Defence Review
  2. A discovery in the Earth's core casts doubt on the origin of much of the planet's water and forces us to rethink what we knew about the formation of the oceans  ECOticias.com
  3. A giant reservoir of water, three times larger than all oceans combined, has been discovered deep beneath the Earth's surface  Українські Національні Новини (УНН)
  4. Scientists discover a hidden ocean 700 kilometres beneath Earth that may be bigger than all oceans  msn.com
  5. Scientists have found a massive water reservoir 700 kilometers below, holding more water than Earth’s entire surface  msn.com
